evals.name: basic-tracker-setup
evals.prompt: hey can you build me an order book tracker for nifty 50 companies? i need to see what new orders these companies are getting - like when TCS wins a big contract or L&T gets a construction project. show me data for the last 6 months in a nice dashboard and also let me export to excel so i can share with my team
evals.expected_output: A working order book tracker system with: (1) Python scripts that fetch NSE/BSE announcements for Nifty 50 companies, (2) Database storing order announcements, (3) Web dashboard showing order book data with charts, (4) Excel export functionality. The dashboard should display companies, their order values, and trends.

evals.name: focused-defense-sector
evals.prompt: I'm specifically interested in tracking order books for defense companies in nifty 50 (like HAL, BEL if they're in the index). Can you set up something that monitors NSE announcements and also pulls quarterly order book data? I want to see month-by-month trends and get alerts when there's a new defense contract. Export to excel is a must for my investment reports
evals.expected_output: An order book tracker focused on defense sector with: (1) Filtering for defense/aerospace companies, (2) NSE announcement monitoring with keyword filtering for 'defense', 'order', 'contract', (3) Dashboard showing sector-specific metrics, (4) Excel export with defense order analysis, (5) Discussion of quarterly order book tracking from earnings reports.

evals.name: it-services-tcv-tracking
evals.prompt: can u help me track TCV (total contract value) announcements for IT companies in Nifty50? Companies like TCS, Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro etc announce big deals and I want to capture all of them from last 6 months. Need a professional looking web page that shows the data in tables and graphs, plus i should be able to download everything as xlsx file for analysis in excel
evals.expected_output: IT services focused order tracker with: (1) TCV keyword extraction (Total Contract Value), (2) Focus on IT service companies, (3) Web dashboard with professional styling showing deal announcements, (4) Charts showing TCV trends by company, (5) Excel export with IT services specific columns, (6) Handling of USD values (many IT deals in USD).

evals.name: github-actions-telegram-automation
evals.prompt: I want this order tracker to run automatically every day using GitHub Actions and send me notifications on Telegram whenever there's a new order announcement from any Nifty 50 company. Can you set that up? I have a GitHub repo ready and I can create a telegram bot. Need it to run daily around 9:30 AM IST after market opens and send me a summary of all new orders
evals.expected_output: Complete GitHub Actions automation setup with: (1) Telegram bot integration (notifier script), (2) Daily order checker script that fetches and processes new orders, (3) GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/daily-order-check.yml) configured for 9:30 AM IST, (4) Duplicate prevention mechanism (processed_announcements.json), (5) Instructions for setting up Telegram bot and GitHub secrets, (6) Test script for local verification, (7) Error handling and notification system.
